title: anguina bracteata
intro: Anguina bracteata, also known as False Buttonweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anguina bracteata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Anguina bracteata typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
